evals.name: banking-rnd-portfolio
evals.prompt: I'm in banking R&D and need to brainstorm high-impact AI use cases for the next quarter. Cover risk, operations, customer, and productivity.
evals.expected_behavior: Produces a prioritized portfolio with use-case cards, scores impact/data/feasibility/risk/precedent, and recommends quick pilot, R&D candidate, strategic bet, and data-foundation need.

evals.name: aml-use-case-discovery
evals.prompt: Our AML team has too many alerts and low investigator productivity. Discover possible R&D use cases without jumping straight to a model.
evals.expected_behavior: Starts from workflow pain, maps alert triage/case prioritization/entity resolution/typology mining opportunities, flags regulatory risks, and suggests literature search directions.
